inline_comments.message: Maybe this one should move into the model as well. I think that the policy types for the PDPs will be a pretty generic thing.
Yeah - some of these model types are going to be needed for the api work. We were contemplating that yesterday.

this class is too simple to represent the CSAR. 
the CSAR will be automatically downloaded to the configurable place by concatate the setting of policy and the artifact name shown in Iartifact interface of SDC.
